Currently, I’ve been at a loss. Everything feels like too much but also not enough. Overwhelmed… I’ve found myself “planning” and trying to strategize about the future and how to make it better later… But I’m living in the now… I’m here.  I may not have everything I want or think I need but I’m here, I’m where I wanted to be last year and the years prior.  I’ve been fighting for control and trying to “make it happen” but I can’t.  This week finally broke me down, I cried (twice) and felt defeated, hopeless. In that despair I came across a song on my relief playlist “Thy Will”. This hit. I realized this is all bigger than me and more than what petty desires I have. In the grand scheme of everything, all my hyper fixations means nothing. A point of surrender and leaving the weight behind- the instant relief and first genuine smile in a long time.  When we win we praise him, when we lose we praise him.  How can I be anything but grateful ❤️ #blessed #godisgood #livingmydream #innerpeace

Skeleton is a niche sport that requires an individual to literally think outside of the box. With so little readily accessible data, the current status (at the time of my entry) of what teams were looking for did not align with me individually. I did not fit the mold. I’ve been in the sport for eight years and have not only broken the mold but forced a new level of open-mindedness.  The point here is this: the active/current status quo or ways of operation should not be the limiting factors of you experiencing new things. Don’t be afraid to try something new, you might just like it 😉 #floro #mystiquero #skeletonsport #skeletonathlete #headfirst #talenttransfer #dreamchaser #femaleathlete #olympichopeful

My hard times didn’t just magically disappear when I joined this sport, but I had a renewed fire to keep pursuing my dreams.  It can be lonely for a while, maybe even a long time. I’ll never forget the day mom called to say you left us. I was at the grocery store grabbing junk food. I was babbling to buy time but eventually the weight hit me.  I was knocked down so hard, I didn’t think I’d be able to get up again. For a brief moment I didn’t want to. I chose to stay, at first the reason was for mom, she couldn’t bury two kids in a short time. But then I realized I needed to stay for us and our memories- our unfinished adventures.  We will live through those memories we will share, just for us. I miss you big guy 🤍 #grief #loss #bigbrother

In a niche sport like Skeleton, we rely on the knowledge and skill set to be passed down from one generation to the next.  I had the opportunity to slide during a small window of my coaches career- something I didn’t know the magnitude of.  Many learning curves later, we are here on home ice for a home World Championships and he is sled dogging for me. I’m beyond grateful for the support, belief and patience he extends to me. Thank you Matt 🇺🇸 #floro #skeletonathlete #skeletonsport #headfirst #lakeplacid #worldchamps #ibsf

Going back always brings anxiety. I didnt grow up in the culture, so its distant to me, but i think its so beautiful. Its been over 10years and my anxiety had me shaking getting off the plane.  I still get the stares. I still have people walking away from me. I gave myself a few days to be sad about it, but now im ablw to walk around and enjoy the sights and good food.  You cant make them love you, but they will celebrate when the time comes 💜 #fatherland #goinghome #biracial #blasian

Last race of the 2023-2024 season ended with me winning my first gold medal on IBSF World Cup on Home ice 🇺🇸  As the announcer mentioned, I was present for the previous season but as a forerunner, not qualified to race. So coming back there was a lot of pressure and self-doubt. Three meltdowns leading into race day, I was able to at least go into the race numb 😅 (not ideal). After heat one I was ahead and managed to keep my lead after heat two but the skin of my teeth! I’m still leaning how to race, handle pressure and regulate emotions 🫠 I’m grateful for my coaches and teammates who have been at my side since the beginning. This win was even more special, on home ice and with the closest people on the sidelines.  No more ugly crying 😂😂 🎥: IBSF #floro #skeletonsport #skeletonathlete #teamusa #headfirst #lakeplacidny #mtvanhoevenberg #homeice #iceicebaby #worldcup #ibsf

People always ask why I dont accept compliments, relish in my wins/victories or show much expression. One day ill properly explain, but for now… I dont feel safe having those moments. I dont have the people around me to be able to adequately enjoy them. For the few that come by I do, but not so much openly.  I would love to say competing at this level yields competitors and teammates who exude great sportsmanship, but thats not true. The amount of back handed compliments, open aggression, backstabbing that occurs isnt alarming to me but it still hurts. In that moment it may not show but in time, after enough comments it fractures the mask a bit, and in those times its time to be a recluse and let the emotions do what need to be done.  Im not trying to be vague, trust I will talk about this when its time, but this is a gentle reminder to everyone who “doesn’t quite fit in” with the status quo and is actively going aginst the grain: people won’t always understand you, they won’t always agree with you. Don’t let their short sightedness deter you from what you’re fighting for ❤️❤️❤️ #gentlereminder #staystrong #floro #statusquo

From the little girl who never thought she could be anything because her father made her believe she was less than and incapable, keep dreaming✨ I never thought much about higher education, pursuing sports or developing hobbies (outside of reading) due to domestic responsibilities. It wasnt until a coach planted the seed of curiousity, to “BELIEVE”.  Since leaving home, I’ve struggled. I’ve been homeless, couch hopped, dug through refuse for food and went full survival mode.  Now I travel the world competing for Team USA 🇺🇸  Its hard to talk about the dark stuff, but I’ve found many people find solace knowing it’s not always sunshine and rainbows on the world Stage- we have more in common than we let on (unfortunately).  #floro #skeletonsport #mystory #pendingauthor #inspirationalvideo #keepdreaming
